channel.title: Extra on The Median Duck
channel.description: Recent content in Extra on The Median Duck

item.title: Comment, Like, Subscribe!
item.description: Your Task Extra, Extra! Read All About It! Be the First to Say “First!” What Have We Learnt Today? Your Task Never miss a The Median Duck post; most up-to-date reader wins! Participate in The Median Duck Peanut Gallery chatter; most active reader wins! Figure 1: Daddy’s interest has been piqued…and is disappointed by the lack of apostrophe for ‘Papas attention’. Extra, Extra! Read All About It! Readers! Have you found it highly inconvenient to find out if there is a newly published Median Duck post?

item.title: Oboe You Didn't!
item.description: Your Task Little Alex Horne Ob(o)e The New Haut-Bois In Town What Have We Learnt Today? Your Task Critique Little Alex Horne’s Oboe skills as exhibited in the first episode of the 2026 New Year’s Treat. Expand and enhance upon LAH’s oboe performance. Best enhancement wins. Little Alex Horne Ob(o)e In the first episode of the 2026 New Year’s Treat at around the 1:45 mark, Little Alex Horne demonstrates his oboe playing, or rather miming1, skills as part of a joke centered around him recently being awarded an OBE (Officer of the most excellent Order of the British Empire).

item.title: The Magliano Cycles
item.description: Your Task The Source of Data Your Task Assess the accuracy, or inaccuracy (error), of Maisie Adam and her task attempt predictions in Series 20 of Taskmaster. The Source of Data Data has been compiled from existing data, and Ania’s retrospective posts and drawings on Instagram: Episode 1, Episode 2, Episode 3, Episode 4, Episode 5, Episode 6, Episode 7, Episode 8, Episode 9, Episode 10. View this post on Instagram A post shared by Ania Magliano (@aniamagliano)

item.title: The (In)Accuracy of Maisie Adam
item.description: Your Task The Source of Data Data of Discrepancies A Squirt of Error The Final Tally? The Absent Task So, what’s the (Data) Situation? A Comedy of Prediction Errors The General Overview It Will All Get Better With Time? What Have We Learnt Today? Your Task Assess the accuracy, or inaccuracy (error), of Maisie Adam and her task attempt predictions in Series 20 of Taskmaster. Figure 1: Maisie’s opinion on this task and the grilling, or rather microwaving, she is going to endure.
